pi_items.source: verifier.py checks and copies from this exact path to validate
verifier.py parses the GPX and expects the target waypoint <name> tag to match this exactly
verifier.py uses this substring to validate the <link> href attribute in the exported GPX
Task description strictly instructs the agent to link to this specific path. It is verified that the file itself does not actually exist on disk and is a synthetic requirement.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real GPS waypoint data from the fells_loop.gpx dataset (Middlesex Fells Reservation, MA) within Garmin BaseCamp. The agent is instructed to append a synthetic document link ('C:\workspace\data\water_quality_report.pdf') to an existing waypoint and rename it to 'Test Site A'. The verifier explicitly copies the exported GPX file from 'C:\workspace\output\linked_waypoint.gpx' and confirms it contains a <wpt> named 'Test Site A' with a <link> child whose href includes 'water_quality_report.pdf'.
